audit_items.proof_trace: All dynamic allocations in nfp_devlink.c are freed on every execution path. In nfp_devlink_set_lanes, nfp_eth_config_commit_end always calls nfp_eth_config_cleanup_end internally (nfp_nsp_eth.c:369), freeing the nsp handle regardless of return value; the cleanup-on-failure path calls nfp_eth_config_cleanup_end directly. In nfp_devlink_info_get, the inner buf (L272) is freed before its scope exits, the outer buf (L297) is freed on both success (L317) and all error paths via goto labels, and kfree(NULL) on the err_close_nsp path is safe by kernel convention.
